creator: randrianasulu@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 246597
this is git patch resurrecting cinelerra-gg port

well, I tried my best to compile old port after updating Makefile and checksum/plist for newest source. It seems to work!

I didn't changed maintainer yet. I have qemu vm with FreeBSD 14.0 amd64, but /usr/ports currently mounted via nfs from my Slackware server/desktop, and there it lives on tmpfs. So, if my desktop dies due to power failure remaking exact setup will take some time.

freebsd-ports git base at 683a3be4c573df5d1df98a45c80bd901d96cafb5

Note: I co-maintain current upstream, but mostly on Linux.
